mapper.sql: fa.favorite_id, fa.property_id, p.property_type, p.name, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.road_address, ''), NULLIF(p.jibun_address, ''), CONCAT_WS(' ', p.sido, p.sigungu, p.legal_dong)) AS address, p.latitude, p.longitude, ( SELECT t.transaction_type FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id ORDER BY t.deal_date DESC, t.transaction_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_transaction_type, ( SELECT COALESCE(t.deal_amount_krw, t.deposit_amount_krw) FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id ORDER BY t.deal_date DESC, t.transaction_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_deal_amount, ( SELECT t.deal_date FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id ORDER BY t.deal_date DESC, t.transaction_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_deal_date, fa.created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM favorite_apartments fa INNER JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = fa.property_id WHERE fa.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fa.created_at DESC, fa.favorite_id DESC
